ai.status.message: AIService is active (single and multi-agent chapter workflows, default provider: mock, optional legacy adapter supported).
ai.chapter.style_default: Keep the narrative clear, motivations consistent, and prose natural.
ai.chapter.planner_prompt:
You are the planner agent. Build a chapter plan for node "{title}".
Style requirement: {style}
Output format:
1) Goal
2) Scene rhythm (3-5 points)
3) Character motivations and conflict
4) Foreshadowing and payoff

Context:
{context}
ai.chapter.writer_prompt:
You are the writer agent. Draft chapter content for node "{title}" from this plan.
Requirements:
- Write only this node; do not jump across multiple nodes
- Keep key conflicts and foreshadowing
- Follow the node outline strictly and do not rush to the ending
- Use natural prose
- Output only the draft body

[Plan]
{plan}

[Context]
{context}
ai.chapter.reviewer_prompt:
You are the reviewer agent. Review the draft of node "{title}" for lore and logic consistency.
Output format:
quality: 0-1
strengths:
- ...
issues:
- ...
fix_plan:
- ...

[Draft]
{draft}

[Context]
{context}
ai.chapter.synthesizer_prompt:
You are the synthesizer agent. Produce the final chapter for node "{title}" from the draft and review feedback.
Requirements:
- Fix key issues from review
- Keep strengths and core progression
- Output only final chapter text

[Draft]
{draft}

[Review Feedback]
{review_feedback}
ai.branch.prompt:
Task: Propose {count} story branches for node "{title}".
Format: one line per item, like `- Branch X: ...`.

Context:
{context}
ai.workflow.mode_invalid: workflow_mode must be one of: single, multi_agent
ai.chat.planner_prompt:
You are the Plan Agent for node "{title}". First, decide the intent by yourself:
- outline_decompose: decompose the current outline into sequential story beats
- story_extend: propose extension paths beyond what the outline already states

Output strict JSON only (no markdown fences, no extra prose):
{
  "plan_mode": "outline_decompose|story_extend",
  "options": [
    {
      "title": "option title",
      "description": "one-line conflict+goal summary",
      "plan_mode": "outline_decompose|story_extend",
      "sentiment": "conflict|calm|suspense|twist|neutral",
      "outline_steps": ["beat 1", "beat 2", "..."]
    }
  ]
}

Requirements:
1) You must decide plan_mode autonomously; do not rely on keyword matching
2) If plan_mode=outline_decompose: return exactly 1 option, and outline_steps must be a sequential executable decomposition (usually 3-8 beats)
3) If plan_mode=story_extend: return 2-3 distinct extension options
4) title should be concise (<= 20 words)
5) Respect AVOID/LOCKED constraints if provided
6) If user asks for Writer/Reviewer/other agent work, refuse politely as Plan Agent and suggest @writer/@review
7) Planning should move only one segment forward; never jump straight to the ending

[User Request]
{request}

[Context]
{context}

ai.workflow.mode_judge_prompt: Judge mode=original|sequel and output JSON only.

web.chat.outline_plan_need_confirm: I infer you may want to continue from the current outline and create detailed-outline nodes. If yes, send an explicit confirmation message first.

web.workflow.welcome: You can chat with the LLM directly first to collect enough info. To start the 7-step workflow, reply with "original" or "sequel". After your verbal confirmation, the LLM can output key points for optional form fill.
web.workflow.need_mode: Please provide an exact mode first: reply only "original" or "sequel".
web.workflow.ask_goal: Got it. Next, provide a concrete writing goal (core conflict and target progression).
web.workflow.need_goal: Goal is still vague. Add an actionable goal with conflict or progression direction.
web.workflow.ask_sync: Step 2 /sync: provide source ending/background (timeline, character states, immutable facts).
web.workflow.need_sync: /sync is too short. Add key background and hard facts.
web.workflow.sync_failed: Failed to build /sync background package. Retry.
web.workflow.sync_ready: /sync background package is ready. Review it first. If approved, reply: confirm background
web.workflow.sync_wait_confirm: Please confirm /sync package first. Reply `confirm background` to continue, or send corrections.
web.workflow.ask_specify: Step 3 /specify: provide spec (scope, pacing, ending direction, must-keep elements).
web.workflow.need_specify: /specify is not concrete enough. Add executable constraints.
web.workflow.clarify_failed: Failed to generate clarification questions. Retry.
web.workflow.ask_clarify_answers: Step 4 /clarify: answer these questions one by one:
web.workflow.need_clarify_answers: Please answer the clarification questions before continuing.
web.workflow.ask_plan_notes: Step 5 /plan: add your planning preferences (or reply "none"). I will then generate an outline draft.

web.tutorial.title: ElyHa Web Quick Tutorial
web.tutorial.step_3: 3. Enable edge mode and click two nodes to connect.
web.tutorial.step_4: 4. Select a node and edit content/metadata in inspector.
web.tutorial.step_6: 6. Use AI panel for generation and reviews.
web.tutorial.body:
1. Create or select a project.
2. Add nodes and set node type/status.
3. Enable edge mode and click two nodes in sequence to create an edge.
4. Drag node header to move node coordinates.
5. Select node to edit metadata in inspector.
6. Use validate/export/snapshot/rollback to keep structure safe.
7. Use AI panel to generate chapter/branches and run lore/logic review.

web.outline.chat_recommend: Start with direct AI chat first. The system keeps conversation history so the LLM can maintain context across turns.
